sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value Int32, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, 3), (2, 5), (3, 12), (4, NULL);
SELECT id, bitmaskToList(value) AS bitmask FROM test_table WHERE bitmaskToList(value) != '' AND id > 0;
SELECT id, count(*) AS count_value FROM test_table WHERE value > 7 GROUP BY id HAVING count_value > 1;
SELECT id, value, (SELECT bitmaskToList(value) FROM test_table WHERE id = t.id) AS bitmask FROM test_table AS t WHERE value > (SELECT max(value) FROM test_table);
CREATE TABLE temp_table (num_id Int32, encoded_value String);
INSERT INTO temp_table (num_id, encoded_value) VALUES (1, bitmaskToList(3)), (2, bitmaskToList(5));
SELECT t1.num_id, bitmaskToList(t1.num_id) AS encoded FROM temp_table AS t1 JOIN test_table AS t2 ON t1.num_id > t2.id WHERE t2.value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, SUM(value) OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY created_at) AS running_total FROM test_table WHERE id > 0 ORDER BY running_total DESC;
